zero_2.error: SIGSEGV (Signal 11) during deepspeed.initialize() — NCCL communication init crash. Model + LoRA loaded successfully. Crash identical to FSDP wrap_policy SIGSEGV.

zero_3.error: SIGSEGV (Signal 11) during deepspeed.initialize() — same crash as ZeRO-2 and FSDP.

root_cause: torch 2.9.0 NCCL communication layer bug. All distributed frameworks (FSDP, DeepSpeed ZeRO-2, DeepSpeed ZeRO-3) crash with SIGSEGV at NCCL collective initialization after model loading. Model checkpoint loading and LoRA adapter application work fine in isolation.
